title: Alone
actors: Yelena Kuzmina, Pyotr Sobolevsky, Sergey Gerasimov
plot: The story of a newly graduated Leningrad teacher, Yelena Kuzmina. She goes furniture shopping with her fiance, Petya, and in a fantasy sequence she imagines teaching a class of neat, obedient city schoolchildren. Instead, she is a...
